body.description: Content base64-encoded in a JSON object

content.description: Base64 encoded bytes of the document.

account_name.description: Account name of the seal contract that should be used. If your company own more than one seal and the field account_name is not given or empty, then the first given seal for the API user will be used for sealing.

page.description:
Page number (0-indexed) where the signature appears.
This is a String and not a number!

height.description: Height of the signature in pixels.

width.description: Width of the signature in pixels.

rotation.description:
Defines a rotation of the field content. 
If used in context with a form field, then only the values 0, 90, 180, 270 are legal.
Otherwise every value is legal. The rotation is applied counter clockwise.

content_type.description: Content type of bytes sent in content. At the moment this MUST be image/png

positions.description: Must not be provided when position is used.

form_field.description: Must not be provided when position is used.

form_field.description: Must not be provided when positions are used.
Name of the form field in which the signature is placed. If multiple fields of this name are present in the document, all will be used.

position.description: Must not be provided when form_field is used.

Sample2.summary: Seal document with default visual signature

Sample3.summary: Seal document with custom visual signature
